calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-12-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Sandra Scott for petitioner Susan Griffin-Kerbs, who was also present.

The matter was called for hearing on Probate of Will and for Letters Testimentary.

The Court inquired whether there were any objections to the petition. No objections were raised. There being no objection, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated June 4, 2024, is admitted to probate. Susan Griffin Kerbs is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for May 11, 2027, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. The Court disclosed that the assigned probate referee is married to a legal advisory staff member of this court.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
